_comment: Production build defines baked into the APK. Copy to dart_defines.prod.json (gitignored) before running scripts/build-apk.sh. Changing any value here means rebuilding the APK — these are compiled into the bundle, not read at runtime.
_GOOGLE_MAPS_KEY_help: Optional. Google Cloud project API key with Static Maps API enabled. Without it, the Explore page renders the OSM map only (no static-preview card). Safe to leave empty for pre-prod.
_GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID_help: Optional. OAuth 2.0 Web client id (NOT Android). Backend's JWKS verifier accepts ID tokens minted by this client. Leave empty to disable Google Sign-In; phone OTP login still works.
